section_name: Testing by Driver Education School and Certain Driver Education Course Providers
text:
(a) An in-person driver education provider or online driver education provider licensed under Chapter 1001 (Driver and Traffic Safety Education) , Education Code, may administer to a student of that provider the vision, highway sign, and traffic law parts of the examination required by Section 521.161 (Examination of License Applicants) .

(a-1) A parent-taught driver education provider licensed under Chapter 1001 (Driver and Traffic Safety Education) , Education Code, may administer to a student of that course the highway sign and traffic law parts of the examination required by Section 521.161 (Examination of License Applicants) .

(b) An examination administered under this section complies with the examination requirements of this subchapter as to the parts of the examination administered.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.1655 — Testing by Driver Education School and Certain Driver Education Course Providers

(a) An in-person driver education provider or online driver education provider licensed under Chapter 1001 (Driver and Traffic Safety Education) , Education Code, may administer to a student of that provider the vision, highway sign, and traffic law parts of the examination required by Section 521.161 (Examination of License Applicants) .

(a-1) A parent-taught driver education provider licensed under Chapter 1001 (Driver and Traffic Safety Education) , Education Code, may administer to a student of that course the highway sign and traffic law parts of the examination required by Section 521.161 (Examination of License Applicants) .

(b) An examination administered under this section complies with the examination requirements of this subchapter as to the parts of the examination administered.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 663 (H.B.1560), Sec. 5.64, eff. September 1, 2021.*
